creator: jeffrey.e.pieper@intel.com
text:
Couple of questions:

1. Are you using the in-kernel driver or OOT (out-of-tree)?
2. Which lagg protocol are you using?
3. What is your exact interface configuration? Just lagg? lagg + VLAN? or ???

If you could please provide ifconfig output for all interfaces as well as the contents of /boot/loader.conf, it would help in reproducing this issue.
